candidate_definition_hints.text: experimental Juce AudioPluginHost port to AAP (Android Audio Plugin) / The development is moved to aap-juce-plugin-host-cmake
aap-juce-plugin-host is a port of JUCE AudioPluginHost (`JUCE/extras/AudioPluginHost`) to [aap-juce](https://github.com/atsushieno/aap-juce).
